description_long: This handbag features a trapezoidal woven body with a natural straw or rattan texture, accented by a bold geometric black pattern on both main faces. The bag is structured with dark brown trim along the top edge and corners, providing contrast and reinforcement. Two large, circular wooden handles are attached at the top, giving the bag a distinctive and stylish appearance. The sides taper inward toward the base, creating a sleek silhouette. The interior appears spacious and open, suitable for carrying personal items. The overall design blends traditional craftsmanship with modern urban fashion.
description: A trapezoidal woven handbag with geometric black patterns, dark brown trim, and large circular wooden handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the geometric black pattern on the woven body and both circular handles clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile, the woven texture, and the full circular shape of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same geometric pattern and handle arrangement visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the woven construction with both handles.
attribute_strap_type: Two large, rigid circular wooden handles; short, non-adjustable, attached directly to the bag's top edge.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Open top with no visible closure mechanism.
attribute_pattern: Geometric black pattern on a woven yellow background.
